repository.name: Godot Engine
repository.description: **Godot Engine is a feature-packed, cross-platform game engine to create 2D and 3D games from a unified interface.** It provides a comprehensive set of common tools, so that users can focus on making games without having to reinvent the wheel.

trust.notes: Bootstrapped from `README.md` and `.github/CODEOWNERS`. Maintainer information was imported from broad CODEOWNERS patterns with multiple team owners, so `owners.team` was left unset and `owners.maintainers` preserves the competing owner candidates. Inferred `repo.build` from `.github/workflows/android_builds.yml`. Inferred `repo.test` from `.github/workflows/android_builds.yml`. This is an overlay bootstrap, not a maintainer-controlled canonical record. Preserved prior verified status: no previously present field regressed in this refresh.
